function_v0.doc:
Check if the threshold policy can be enforced.

Verifies that the number of authenticated signers meets or exceeds
the configured threshold for this context rule.

# Returns

* `true` if the threshold is met
* `false` otherwise
function_v0.name: can_enforce

function_v0.doc:
Enforce the threshold policy.

Records that authorization occurred and emits an event.
This is called after `can_enforce` returns true.
function_v0.name: enforce

function_v0.doc: Install the threshold policy for a smart account.\n\nStores the threshold configuration for the given context rule.
function_v0.name: install

function_v0.doc: Uninstall the threshold policy for a smart account.\n\nRemoves the threshold configuration for the given context rule.
function_v0.name: uninstall

function_v0.doc: Get the current threshold for a smart account
function_v0.name: get_threshold

function_v0.doc: Set a new threshold for a smart account
function_v0.name: set_threshold

udt_error_enum_v0.doc: Error types for WebAuthn verification operations.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: WebAuthnError

cases.doc: The signature payload is invalid or has incorrect format.
cases.name: SignaturePayloadInvalid

cases.doc: The client data exceeds the maximum allowed length.
cases.name: ClientDataTooLong

cases.doc: Failed to parse JSON from client data.
cases.name: JsonParseError

cases.doc: The type field in client data is not "webauthn.get".
cases.name: TypeFieldInvalid

cases.doc: The challenge in client data does not match expected value.
cases.name: ChallengeInvalid

cases.doc: The authenticator data format is invalid or too short.
cases.name: AuthDataFormatInvalid

cases.doc: The User Present (UP) bit is not set in authenticator flags.
cases.name: PresentBitNotSet

cases.doc: The User Verified (UV) bit is not set in authenticator flags.
cases.name: VerifiedBitNotSet

cases.doc: Invalid relationship between Backup Eligibility and State bits.
cases.name: BackupEligibilityAndStateNotSet

udt_struct_v0.doc:
WebAuthn signature data structure containing all components needed for
verification.

This structure encapsulates the signature and associated data generated
during a WebAuthn authentication ceremony.
udt_struct_v0.name: WebAuthnSigData

fields.doc: Raw authenticator data from the WebAuthn response.
fields.name: authenticator_data

fields.doc: Raw client data JSON from the WebAuthn response.
fields.name: client_data

fields.doc: The cryptographic signature (64 bytes for secp256r1).
fields.name: signature
